'''Bachenkall''', a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Imperial Navy/Legends|Imperial Navy]] [[Imperial officer/Legends|officer]], was one of the [[Executor-class Star Dreadnought/Legends|Star Dreadnought]] [[Executor/Legends|''Executor'']]{{'s}} [[Helm officer/Legends|helmsmen]] during the events leading up to the [[Battle of Hoth/Legends|Battle of Hoth]]. He was trained in [[Capital ship/Legends|capital ship]] [[Pilot/Legends|piloting]] and tactics at the [[Raithal Academy/Legends|Imperial Training Academy]] on [[Raithal/Legends|Raithal]], and he eventually rose to the rank of [[Warrant Officer/Legends|warrant officer]]. In [[3 ABY/Legends|3 ABY]], Bachenkall was present in the crewpits of the ''Executor'', serving under [[Lieutenant Commander/Legends|Lieutenant Commander]] [[Ardan]], when [[Anakin Skywalker/Legends|Darth Vader]] entered the [[Bridge (starship)/Legends|bridge]] to discuss the findings of a [[Viper probe droid/Legends|Viper probe droid]]. The [[Droid/Legends|droid]] had discovered the location of [[Echo Base/Legends|Echo Base]], the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance's]] [[Alliance High Command/Legends|headquarters]] in the [[Hoth system/Legends|Hoth system]].

==Biography==
[[File:NavyCrewmen.jpg|thumb|left|250px|Bachenkall and other members of the bridge crew watch the passing Darth Vader.]]
The [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Gender/Legends|male]] Bachenkall served in the [[Imperial Navy/Legends|Imperial Navy]] during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]]. He graduated from the [[Raithal Academy/Legends|Imperial Training Academy]] on<ref name="CCG" /> the [[Planet/Legends|planet]]<ref name="tabsb">''[[The Truce at Bakura Sourcebook]]''</ref> [[Raithal/Legends|Raithal]], a naval school that trained [[Pilot/Legends|pilots]] in [[Capital ship/Legends|capital starship]] helm tactics.<ref name="CCG" /> By early [[3 ABY/Legends|3 ABY]],<ref name="NEC">''[[The New Essential Chronology]]'' dates the events of [[Star Wars: Episode V The Empire Strikes Back|''Star Wars'': Episode V ''The Empire Strikes Back'']] to [[3 ABY/Legends|3 ABY]].</ref> Bachenkall had risen to the rank of [[Warrant Officer/Legends|warrant officer]]<ref name="CCG" /> and served with the [[Death Squadron/Legends|Imperial Death Squadron]] aboard the [[Executor-class Star Dreadnought/Legends|Star Dreadnought]] [[Executor/Legends|''Executor'']], the personal [[Flagship/Legends|flagship]] of [[Dark Lord of the Sith/Legends|Lord]] [[Anakin Skywalker/Legends|Darth Vader]],<ref name="ESB">{{Film|V}}</ref> as a [[Helm officer/Legends|helmsman]] under [[Lieutenant Commander/Legends|Lieutenant Commander]] [[Ardan]]'s supervision.<ref name="CCG" />

In 3 ABY,<ref name="NEC" /> Bachenkall was present within the ''Executor''{{'s}} starboard command pit when Vader strode across the [[Bridge (starship)/Legends|bridge's]] command walkway to discuss the findings of a [[Viper probe droid/Legends|Viper probe droid]] in the [[Hoth system/Legends|Hoth system]] with [[Fleet Admiral/Legends|Fleet Admiral]] [[Kendal Ozzel/Legends|Kendal Ozzel]] and [[Captain/Legends|Captain]] [[Firmus Piett/Legends|Firmus Piett]]. Along with the rest of the crewmen within the command pit, Bachenkall watched in fearful silence as the Dark Lord passed above them. The [[Probe droid/Legends|probe droid's]] data revealed the location of [[Echo Base/Legends|Echo Base]], the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance's]] [[Alliance High Command/Legends|headquarters]] on the planet [[Hoth/Legends|Hoth]], leading to the ''Executor''{{'s}} participation in the subsequent [[Battle of Hoth/Legends|Battle of Hoth]].<ref name="ESB" />

==Personality and traits==
Bachenkall and the other members of the pit crew displayed fearful deference at the presence of Darth Vader as he stalked across the upper command walkway of the ''Executor''{{'s}} bridge to learn of the Viper probe [[Droid/Legends|droid's]] report in the Hoth [[Star system/Legends|system]].<ref name="ESB" /> He had fair skin.<ref name="CCG" />

==Skills and abilities==
Bachenkall was typical of graduates of the Empire's Training Academy on Raithal,<ref name="CSWE">{{CSWECite|I|54|Bachenkall, Warrant Officer}}</ref> where he was trained in capital [[Starship/Legends|starship]] helm tactics.<ref name="CCG" />

==Equipment==
Bachenkall wore a [[Color/Legends|light gray]] technician's uniform and a dark gray [[Hat/Legends|cap]] with a [[headset comlink]].<ref name="ESB" />

==Behind the scenes==
Bachenkall made his first appearance in the film [[Star Wars: Episode V The Empire Strikes Back|''Star Wars'': Episode V ''The Empire Strikes Back'']] as an unidentified extra among Darth Vader's bridge crew.<ref name="ESB" /> The character's name and elements of his backstory were introduced in the ''[[Dagobah Limited]]'' expansion set of [[Decipher]]'s [[Star Wars Customizable Card Game|''Star Wars'' Customizable Card Game]], released in [[1997]].<ref name="CCG" />

The character name "Bachenkall" is an anagram of Decipher game playtester [[Chuck Kallenbach]].<ref name="TFN">{{WebCite|url=http://www.theforce.net/ccg/flashback/article.asp|text=CCG - Flashback Premiere - Force is Strong with This One|author=Radke, Joshua J.|date=2002-09-30|work=[[TheForce.net]]|archivedate=20190730143453}}</ref>
